subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of lords and Master of necks! I bear witness that Thou didst give glad tidings unto Thy servants in Thy Books and Thy Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا رب الارباب و مالک الرقاب اشهد انک بشرت العباد فی کتبک و زبرک و
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @apocalyptic imagery, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
